mapper.insert: /* SmsBackupMapper.insertSmsBackup */ INSERT INTO AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG_BACKUP ( MSG_ID ,SUBJECT ,MSG_TYPE ,MSG_TYPE_SECOND ,MSG_TYPE_THIRD ,STATUS ,SCHEDULE_TIME ,SUBMIT_TIME ,MESSAGE ,CALLBACK_NUM ,RCPT_DATA ,FILE_COUNT ,FILE_NAME1 ,FILE_NAME2 ,FILE_NAME3 ,CDR_ID ,RESULT ,RCS_RESULT ,KKO_RESULT ,RESULT_DESC ,DELIVER_TIME ,REPORT_RECV_TIME ,TELCOINFO ,FAIL_SEND ,K_TMPLCODE ,K_MESSAGE ,K_BUTTON ,K_ADFLAG ,K_SENDERKEY ,R_MESSAGEBASEID ,R_BODY ,R_BUTTON ,R_HEADER ,R_FOOTER ,R_COPYALLOWED ,R_QUERYID ,RESERVED01 ,RESERVED02 ,RESERVED03 ,KISA_ORIG_CODE ,R_AGENCYID ,R_AGENCYKEY ,R_BRANDKEY ,R_CDR_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT MSG_ID ,SUBJECT ,MSG_TYPE ,MSG_TYPE_SECOND ,MSG_TYPE_THIRD ,STATUS ,SCHEDULE_TIME ,SUBMIT_TIME ,MESSAGE ,CALLBACK_NUM ,RCPT_DATA ,FILE_COUNT ,FILE_NAME1 ,FILE_NAME2 ,FILE_NAME3 ,CDR_ID ,RESULT ,RCS_RESULT ,KKO_RESULT ,RESULT_DESC ,DELIVER_TIME ,REPORT_RECV_TIME ,TELCOINFO ,FAIL_SEND ,K_TMPLCODE ,K_MESSAGE ,K_BUTTON ,K_ADFLAG ,K_SENDERKEY ,R_MESSAGEBASEID ,R_BODY ,R_BUTTON ,R_HEADER ,R_FOOTER ,R_COPYALLOWED ,R_QUERYID ,RESERVED01 ,RESERVED02 ,RESERVED03 ,KISA_ORIG_CODE ,R_AGENCYID ,R_AGENCYKEY ,R_BRANDKEY ,R_CDR_ID ,SYSDATE FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG A WHERE SCHEDULE_TIME <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -6), 'YYYYMMDD') || '235959'
